note: IHB interest allocation for notional pooling and ZBA sweep structures per OECD TP Guidelines 2022.

vectors.name: notional_pool_two_members_act360
vectors.description: Notional pool: PARENT +500000, SUB_A -200000, pool_net=300000, rate=5%, 30-day ACT/360. PARENT receives 1250 credit interest; SUB_A gets 0 (net pool is positive).

output_payload.table_source: OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines 2022 Ch.I (arm's-length standard) + Ch.VIII (IHB cash pools); SWIFT IHB banking guide; ECB TARGET2 compensation methodology
output_payload.regulatory_basis: Interest allocation per OECD TP Guidelines 2022 Ch.VIII (cash pooling, arm's-length principle); pool leader earns spread between lending/borrowing rates; arm_length_rate should reflect comparable uncontrolled transactions. ACT/360 default per SWIFT TARGET2.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: entity IDs, aggregate balances, rates, and period parameters only. No account holder, ultimate beneficiary, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not tax, legal, or accounting advice. IHB structures require review by qualified transfer-pricing advisors and local tax counsel.

vectors.name: zba_sweep_with_withholding
vectors.description: ZBA sweep: PARENT +100000, CHILD -60000. Rate=6%, 30-day ACT/360. PARENT earns 500, CHILD pays -300, withholding_rate=0 both.

output_payload.table_source: OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines 2022 Ch.I (arm's-length standard) + Ch.VIII (IHB cash pools); SWIFT IHB banking guide; ECB TARGET2 compensation methodology
output_payload.regulatory_basis: Interest allocation per OECD TP Guidelines 2022 Ch.VIII (cash pooling, arm's-length principle); pool leader earns spread between lending/borrowing rates; arm_length_rate should reflect comparable uncontrolled transactions. ACT/360 default per SWIFT TARGET2.

output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not tax, legal, or accounting advice. IHB structures require review by qualified transfer-pricing advisors and local tax counsel.

vectors.description: Empty-input guard: rate=0 → zero interest regardless of pool_type or balances.
